mapper.select: SELECT id, round, image_url AS imageUrl, is_visible AS isVisible, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM fun_quiz WHERE is_visible = true ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT id, round, image_url AS imageUrl, is_visible AS isVisible, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM fun_quiz ORDER BY id DESC
SELECT id, round, image_url AS imageUrl, is_visible AS isVisible, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM fun_quiz WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO fun_quiz (round, image_url, is_visible) VALUES (#{round}, #{imageUrl}, #{isVisible})
